refined_caption: A rodent is visible on the floor of a hospital room. The rodent appears to be in close proximity to patient areas.
complaint_description: I was shocked to see a rat on the floor of my hospital room. This is completely unacceptable and I'm worried about the health and safety of patients. The hospital needs to take immediate action to address this pest control issue.
voice_text: There's a rat in my hospital room, this is disgusting and I'm really concerned about patient safety.
